results.title: Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
results.description: What Happened? Shares of fabless chip and software maker Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) fell 2.9% in the afternoon session after a report that South Korea's SK Hynix is slowing its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) expansion rattled the AI-chip complex. The headline sounds bearish for AI, but the underlying...
